global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear focus on a flash sale announcement.
global.main_message: Promoting a flash sale for bestsellers.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A vibrant green background fills the entire canvas, providing a lively and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: ThreadMark logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'ThreadMark' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top center.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge with the word 'SALE' in bold text, located at the top right corner.

elements.label: Flash sale announcement
elements.description: A prominent headline that reads 'Flash sale live' in large, eye-catching font, centered in the lower part of the ad.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Shop bestsellers now

elements.label: Shop bestsellers text
elements.description: A smaller text below the headline that says 'Shop bestsellers now', providing additional context.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A bold, rectangular button at the bottom center with the text 'Order now' in white, encouraging immediate action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, ThreadMark logo, flash sale announcement, order now button
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top center, the sale badge is at the top right, the headline is centered below the logo, followed by body text, and the CTA button is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ThreadMark, SALE, Flash sale live, Shop bestsellers now, Order now
